description: Style Note This white top with pretty embroidery, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this pretty top. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Product Details White top with a mandarin collar and a split neckline, three quarter sleeves, short buttoned placket, embroidery on the front and waist, pleated from the waist down and elasticated at the waist on the back Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
